certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys) and random strings. No assurance of minimum security of SSPs (e.g., keys, bit strings) that are externally loaded, or of SSPs established with externally loaded SSPs
certificate.description: Fujitsu Enterprise Postgres Cryptographic Module is the FIPS validated cryptographic library for Fujitsu Enterprise Postgres. This cryptographic library is used for communication data encryption and Transparent Data Encryption to provide enhanced data protection through robust cryptographic algorithms.
